summary: Iteration 26 - Human vs AI Validation Experiment Feature Testing. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with Validation page rendering correctly, navbar link working, admin controls visible when authenticated, correlation metrics (Spearman ρ, Kendall τ, Pearson r) displayed, and Human vs AI Ranking table with Delta column showing 47 papers.

backend: GET /api/validation/status contains avg/min/max matches per paper
Results contain p-values for statistical significance
Results contain comparison array with 47 papers
Comparison entries have required fields (id, title, h1_avg_rating, human_rank, ai_rank, rank_delta)
POST /api/validation/import requires admin auth (401/403 without token)
POST /api/validation/import succeeds with valid admin token
Main leaderboard data is separate from validation data (silo verified)
frontend: Validation page loads with title 'Human vs AI Validation'
H1 Papers stat card shows 47 papers (≥5 expert ratings)
AI Matches stat card shows 170 matches (15.7% coverage)
Avg Matches/Paper stat card shows 7.2 (min 3 / max 12)
Tournament stat card shows 'Complete'
Correlation Metrics heading visible
Spearman ρ badge shows -0.118
Kendall τ badge shows -0.085
Pearson r badge shows -0.082
Interpretation text displays correctly
Human vs AI Ranking table has 47 rows
Table columns: Paper, H1 Rating, Human Rank, AI Rank, AI Score, Win%, Matches, Delta
Delta column shows color-coded values (red for +, green for -)
Admin controls NOT visible without login
Validation link visible in navbar
Navbar Validation link navigates to /validation
Admin login with password works
Admin controls visible after login (Import, Run Tournament, Reset buttons)
Match count input field visible for admin
Methodology section visible at bottom

critical_code_review_comments: Validation experiment uses separate MongoDB collections (validation_papers, validation_matches) - data silo confirmed
Correlation metrics computed using scipy.stats (spearman, kendall, pearson) - implementation correct
Admin endpoints properly protected with verify_admin dependency
Frontend correctly uses sessionStorage admin_token for admin operations
data-testid attributes present on all key interactive elements for testing
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing validation data (47 papers, 170 matches pre-imported)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified the Human vs AI Validation experiment feature. Data already exists: 47 H1 papers with ≥5 expert ratings imported, 170 AI tournament matches completed. Correlation shows negligible negative relationship (Spearman ρ=-0.118, p=0.43 - not statistically significant). The validation data is completely siloed from main leaderboard using separate MongoDB collections.
